2604.20286.title: MambaLiteUNet: Cross-Gated Adaptive Feature Fusion for Robust Skin Lesion Segmentation
2604.20286.paper_summary: Recent segmentation models have demonstrated promising efficiency by aggressively reducing parameter counts and computational complexity. However, these models often struggle to accurately delineate fine lesion boundaries and texture patterns essential for early skin cancer diagnosis and treatment planning. In this paper, we propose MambaLiteUNet, a compact yet robust segmentation framework that integrates Mamba state space modeling into a U-Net architecture, along with three key modules: Adaptive Multi-Branch Mamba Feature Fusion (AMF), Local-Global Feature Mixing (LGFM), and Cross-Gated Attention (CGA). These modules are designed to enhance local-global feature interaction, preserve spatial details, and improve the quality of skip connections. MambaLiteUNet achieves an average IoU of 87.12% and average Dice score of 93.09% across ISIC2017, ISIC2018, HAM10000, and PH2 benchmarks, outperforming state-of-the-art models. Compared to U-Net, our model improves average IoU and Dice by 7.72 and 4.61 points, respectively, while reducing parameters by 93.6% and GFLOPs by 97.6%. Additionally, in domain generalization with six unseen lesion categories, MambaLiteUNet achieves 77.61% IoU and 87.23% Dice, performing best among all evaluated models. Our extensive experiments demonstrate that MambaLiteUNet achieves a strong balance between accuracy and efficiency, making it a competitive and practical solution for dermatological image segmentation. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/maklachur/MambaLiteUNet.
2604.20286.paper_summary_zh: 最近的分割模型通過積極減少參數數量和計算複雜性，展示了令人鼓舞的效率。<lb/>然而，這些模型往往難以準確劃定對於早期皮膚癌診斷和治療計劃至關重要的細微病變邊界和紋理模式。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了MambaLiteUNet，一個緊湊但強大的分割框架，將Mamba狀態空間建模整合到U-Net架構中，並包含三個關鍵模塊：自適應多分支Mamba特徵融合（AMF）、局部-全局特徵混合（LGFM）和交叉門控注意力（CGA）。<lb/>這些模塊旨在增強局部-全局特徵互動，保留空間細節，並改善跳躍連接的質量。<lb/>MambaLiteUNet在ISIC2017、ISIC2018、HAM10000和PH2基準上實現了87.12%的平均IoU和93.09%的平均Dice分數，超越了最先進的模型。<lb/>與U-Net相比，我們的模型分別提高了7.72和4.61點的平均IoU和Dice，同時減少了93.6%的參數和97.6%的GFLOPs。<lb/>此外，在六個未見病變類別的領域泛化中，MambaLiteUNet實現了77.61%的IoU和87.23%的Dice，在所有評估模型中表現最佳。<lb/>我們的廣泛實驗表明，MambaLiteUNet在準確性和效率之間達成了良好的平衡，使其成為皮膚科影像分割的競爭性和實用解決方案。<lb/>我們的代碼已公開可用於：https://github.com/maklachur/MambaLiteUNet。
2604.20286.author: Md Maklachur Rahman et.al.
2604.20286.authors: Md Maklachur Rahman, Soon Ki Jung, Tracy Hammond
